LAW AND MOTION 302, FRANK C. LIUZZI AND MICHAEL E. HALE'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFFS IS CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 4, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302, TO GIVE THE MOVING PARTY A CHANCE TO COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE MOVING PARTY SHALL PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE MOTION WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE BY OCTOBER 25, 2013. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, REPORTER: TONY VAUGHN CSR #6185 (302/EHG)

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE LAW FIRM OF LIUZZI, MURPHY, SOLOMON & AIKINS, LLP'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFFS AELLA TELEB, A MINOR BY AN THROUGH HER GAL LILIAN PEREZ, LILIAN PEREZ INDIVIDUALLY AND AELLA TELEB IS TAKEN OFF-CALENDAR. IT IS NOT CLEAR FROM THE MOVING PAPERS WHICH CLIENTS ARE THE SUBJECT OF THE MOTION TO WITHDRAW AS COUNSEL, AND WHETHER EACH OF THE AFFECTED CLIENTS HAS BEEN SERVED. SPECIFICALLY, IT IS NOT CLEAR WHETHER COUNSEL SEEKS TO WITHDRAW FROM REPRESENTING ARNEL TELEB. FURTHER, ANY PROPOSED ORDER MUST STATE THE NAME OF EACH CLIENT AFFECTED BY THE MOTION IN ITEM 1 (NOT "ET AL."), AND ANY ORDER, IF SIGNED, WOULD BE EFFECTIVE ONLY UPON FILING PROOF OF SERVICE (ITEM 5(A)). JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 (302/MJM)
